settings.label: Fit notes
settings.fit_note: Replace this with real garment measurements, model details, and market-specific sizing guidance for customers in the United States and Europe.

settings.micro_copy: Secure checkout. Duties and taxes are surfaced at checkout where applicable for US and European orders.

settings.items:
Breathable fabrics and controlled drape for a cleaner city silhouette
Clear fit communication for first-order confidence across markets
Womenswear-led styling with a selective menswear extension
Built for commuting, travel, and repeat wear

settings.heading: Shipping and returns
settings.body: Processing, delivery windows, and returns policy should be localized by target market. For launch, keep the message simple, premium, and trust-building for US and European customers.

settings.heading: Fabric and care
settings.body: Use this area for material composition, care instructions, and quality cues that justify your premium price range while reinforcing the brand's cleaner lines and softer textures.
